name: Michael
oracleText:
Flying, first strike
Whenever Michael, Seraph of the First Charge attacks, other attacking creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
Whenever one or more other Angels you control attack, exile up to one target tapped creature defending player controls.
flavorText: "Saint Michael the Archangel, defend us in battle."
notes: Mythic angelic battle leader for the Angels and Demons set, built to reward attacking with a heavenly host.
title: Seraph of the First Charge
